title: System Design for Beginners (Full Guide)
summary: AWS Developers presents a system design interview framework with seven sequential steps: requirements gathering, traffic estimation, high-level component design, API specification, tech stack selection, and implementation constraints. The approach emphasizes understanding the problem and business requirements before choosing technology.
writeup: This AWS Developers tutorial lays out a beginner system design framework built around solving the problem before choosing technology. The seven-step sequence runs through requirements, traffic estimation, high-level components, API contracts, tech stack, and implementation constraints. It frames system design interviews as a problem-first exercise: define what the system must do and how much load it carries before settling on tools. The takeaway is a repeatable order of operations that keeps technology selection downstream of requirements and estimation.
